mapper.sql: pef.employee_id as pe_id, pef.name, pef.relationship, pef.company, pef.post, pef.tele, pef.gender, pef.birthday, pef.mobile_phone, pef.attribute1, pef.attribute2, pef.attribute3, pef.enabled_flag, pef.id, pef.create_time, pef.create_by, pef.update_time, pef.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.mobile_phone as ${tAlias}_mobile_phone, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from pm_employee_family pef left join pm_employee_family_temp peft on pef.id = peft.family_id and peft.check_flag = 'D' and peft.enabled_flag =1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_family (employee_id, name, relationship, company, post, tele, gender, birthday, mobile_phone, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_family set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, mobile_phone = #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pef.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.company) > 0 then pef.company else null end as company, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.gender) > 0 then pef.gender else null end as gender, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.mobile_phone) > 0 then pef.mobile_phone else null end as mobile_phone, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.name) > 0 then pef.name else null end as name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.post) > 0 then pef.post else null end as post, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.relationship) > 0 then pef.relationship else null end as relationship, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pef.tele) > 0 then pef.tele else null end as tele from pm_employee_family pef join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pef.employee_id where pef.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pef.company,pef.gender,pef.mobile_phone,pef.name,pef.post,pef.relationship,pef.tele ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'

select
from pm_employee_family pef where pef.enabled_flag = 1 and pef.employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and ( pef.relationship = '子女' or pef.relationship = '儿子' or pef.relationship = '女儿' or pef.relationship = '女' or pef.relationship = '子' or pef.relationship = '女子' )
